title: genista longipes subsp. longipes
intro: Genista longipes subsp. longipes is a plant species within the Fabaceae family, commonly known as broom or gorse, and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been found to have various medicinal benefits, including wound healing and immune system support. The health benefits of Genista longipes subsp. longipes include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and protect against certain diseases. The plant is typically prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, or as a tincture, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
